noAccounts: No accounts. Create your first account on the right.
noAccountsFiltered: No accounts match the selected filters.

actions.delete: Delete this account and all its data

deleteConfirm:
Permanently delete account "{{name}}" and all its data (associated trades)?

This action is irreversible.
confirmArchive: Are you sure you want to archive this account? It will no longer be visible by default.

form.newDescription: Enter information and create the account with one click.
form.name: Name
form.brokerIdTopstepHelp: Optional: leave empty or auto-filled when the account name matches TopStepX exactly (account menu). Do not reuse the same ID on multiple accounts.
form.currencyDescription: Select the currency; only the symbol will be displayed.
form.initialCapitalDescription: Starting capital of the account (optional). Used for MLL and profit target thresholds.
form.chartThresholdHelp: MLL and profit target are absolute account thresholds. The dashboard chart follows the filtered period.
form.mllRequiredWhenEnabled: Enter an MLL amount or disable the option.
form.profitTargetRequiredWhenEnabled: Enter a profit target or disable the option.
form.statusDescription: Active: account in use | Inactive: account on pause | Archived: permanently closed account
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Notes or details to distinguish this account

copyTrading.followersTitle: Accounts that receive a copy of your imports (this account as source)
copyTrading.noFollowers: No follower accounts. On another account, enable copy and choose this one as the source.
copyTrading.copyFromEnabled: This account receives a copy of CSV imports made on the account below
copyTrading.leaderHelp: After saving, importing on that account will also duplicate trades here.

onboarding.title: Create your first trading account
onboarding.description: Before you start recording your trades, create a trading account. We've redirected you to the 'Trading Accounts' tab to guide you.

sync.brokerIdRequired: Use the exact TopStepX account name (account menu) or a valid ProjectX ID. The ID is set automatically when names match.
sync.integrationRequired: Set up the TopStepX integration in Settings → Trading.

errors.credentialsDecryptFailed: Unable to read saved credentials. Reconnect TopStepX in Settings → Trading by entering your API key again.
